<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-470" location="lines:470-476" -->
```bash
  grpcurl -emit-defaults -plaintext -H "Authorization: Bearer $LEDGER_TOKEN" -d '{
    "user_id": "ledger-api-user",
    "parties": ["'"$PARTY_ID"'"]
  }' localhost:2901 \
    com.daml.ledger.api.v2.CommandCompletionService/CompletionStream \
    > completion_response.json

```
